# [Product] Refine Overview and About for trust and methodology

Labels: `area: product-experience`, `type: feature`, `priority: medium`, `status: ready`
Milestone: `v1.0 Public UPL Lens Release`

## Objective

Polish Overview and About so the product feels clear, trustworthy, and
methodologically honest.

## Context

Overview should act as an editorial control room. About should explain source
boundaries, caveats, and methodology in user-facing language.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Overview leads with curated intelligence, not technical portfolio framing.
- [ ] About explains official-site source record vs UPL Lens analytical meaning.
- [ ] Data freshness and caveats are understandable.
- [ ] Frontend build passes.
